pages.raw_text:
No work Is being done today on the
Post street or Boone avenue bridges
owing to the strike Of the bridge and
structural Iron workers. The work
ON the Washington street bridge con-
tinues. Contractor Wohl having sign
ed the scale over which the wholly
aifhouity arose.


The strike yesterday came as a
surprise to labor leaders, as the Diff
Aculty over the scale had been re-
ferred to Business Agent Quinn Of
the trades council.


Quinn stated today that he had
not seen the contractors nor the Of
tlccrs OF the union ana TINT the strike
was undertaken without his knowl-
edge.


Porter is said to be In Seattle to-
day locking for men. He is reported
to have said that he would employ
only union men ana would pay the
scale but that he would pick his men
and hire only capable men.
